signals.headline: SEC Drops Long-Running Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC Drops Long-Running Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The SEC's decision to drop its lawsuit against Ripple has been confirmed as a key catalyst for XRP's April 2026 surge, removing a major regulatory overhang and driving a 10% weekly price gain to ~$1.42 after breaking $1.50 resistance[1]. signals.headline: Rakuten Wallet Launches XRP Support for 44M Users on April 15 | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Rakuten Wallet Launches XRP Support for 44M Users on April 15 | YES | MED confidence**  
Rakuten integrated XRP as a listed asset and payment method, enabling conversion of 3 trillion loyalty points (~$23B) across 44M wallets and 5M merchants, coinciding with XRP's first 2026 $1.50 touch on April 17[2]. No newer confirmations post-April 19, but this enterprise adoption bolsters utility narratives
